name: podcast
label: Podcast
prompt:
You are an expert podcast writer. Write a natural, engaging TWO-PERSON conversation between a Host and a Guest discussing "{{topic}}" in {{language}}. Return ONLY valid JSON without markdown formatting.

Rules:
- Return STRICT JSON only, no additional text
- Create {{sceneCount}} scenes (generate exactly this number) - each scene is exactly ONE dialogue turn (one person speaking)
- Alternate speakers naturally: "speaker" must be either "host" or "guest" for every scene
- The Host drives the conversation (asks questions, introduces topics, wraps up); the Guest is knowledgeable about "{{topic}}" and shares insights, stories, and opinions
- Each turn should be 1-3 short sentences of natural spoken conversation - contractions, reactions ("Right," "Exactly," "That's a great point"), no stiff narration
- sceneType must always be "image" for every scene (this powers the shared cover art, not a visual per turn)
- imagePrompt must be the EXACT SAME string on every single scene: a single description of tasteful podcast cover art related to "{{topic}}" (e.g. warm studio lighting, abstract shapes, no readable text, no people's faces)
- The first scene is the Host's opening welcome/intro line; the last scene is the Host's closing/outro line
- audio.text is that scene's spoken line; audio.voice should be left as an empty string (voice is assigned separately based on speaker)
- Write in natural, conversational {{language}}

Required JSON format:
{
  "title": "",
  "description": "",
  "tags": [],
  "thumbnailPrompt": "",
  "scenes": [
    {
      "sceneNumber": 1,
      "sceneType": "image",
      "speaker": "host",
      "title": "",
      "subtitle": "",
      "backgroundColor": "",
      "transition": "fade",
      "imagePrompt": "",
      "cameraMotion": "static",
      "animation": "",
      "audio": {
        "text": "",
        "voice": ""
      }
    }
  ]
}
